# FoveatedStreamingSession.MessageChannel

**Class**

A bidirectional channel for sending and receiving custom data.

## Declaration

```swift
class MessageChannel
```

## Overview

Use message channels to communicate with the application streaming foveated content to your visionOS app. You can send data with the [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/MessageChannel/sendMessage(_:)] function and receive data through the [doc://com.apple.FoveatedStreaming/documentation/FoveatedStreaming/FoveatedStreamingSession/MessageChannel/receivedMessageStream] async stream.

## Structures

- **FoveatedStreamingSession.MessageChannel.ID**: A unique identifier for a message channel.

## Instance Properties

- **channelStatus**: The state of the message channel.
- **id**: An identifier for the message channel.
- **receivedMessageStream**: An async stream that yields data objects each time the channel receives a message.

## Instance Methods

- **disconnect()**: Manually disconnects and closes the data channel.
- **sendMessage(_:)**: Sends data to the streaming endpoint on this channel.

## Enumerations

- **FoveatedStreamingSession.MessageChannel.ChannelStatus**: The status of a message channel.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Escapable
- Identifiable
- Observable
